description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring bold, retro artwork and a robust, angular design. The side panels are adorned with vibrant graphics depicting a futuristic space scene in red, yellow, and orange, with the word 'DEFENDER' prominently displayed. The front of the cabinet includes a control panel with multiple buttons and joysticks, a coin slot, and a large screen area framed by colorful artwork. The top section houses a marquee with the game's title in large, stylized letters, illuminated for visibility. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or particleboard, with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim. Its overall appearance is iconic of 1980s arcade machines, designed to attract attention in public entertainment spaces.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with bold 'DEFENDER' artwork, a control panel with buttons and joysticks, and a prominent illuminated marquee. The cabinet features vibrant side graphics and a sturdy, angular build.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the full 'DEFENDER' artwork with a space-themed graphic and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the control panel with buttons and joysticks, the screen area, coin slot, and the illuminated marquee with 'DEFENDER' text.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical space-themed artwork and the cabinet's distinctive shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no visible artwork or features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a cluster, featuring a colorful control panel overlay.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'DEFENDER' in large, bold yellow and red letters on a black background with blue and red accents, matching the game's space theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful graphics of a futuristic space scene with a humanoid figure and the 'DEFENDER' logo in red and yellow, set against a black background.
